channel.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports
channel.description: Get the latest news online at Major Digest, the top online news resource for the most reliable news sources. Stay informed about the world around you!

image.title: Major Digest - Reliable and Comprehensive News Sources: sports

item.title: Judge reverses ban on star high school wrestler that was arrested; can compete for fourth straight state title
item.description: A high school wrestler, who was banned from competing after he was arrested for entering a brawl alongside his dad at a tournament, is now eligible again.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Miami's Cam Ward: 'God and work' have gotten me as potential No. 1 pick
item.description: Cam Ward may just be the No. 1 pick in next month's NFL Draft, and the Miami quarterback is giving all the credit to "God and work.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Coby White scores 24 points and Chicago Bulls top Raptors in overtime, 125-115
item.description: Coby White scored 24 points, including a clutch four-point play, and the Bulls rallied to beat the Toronto Raptors 125-115 in overtime on Friday night.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Mitchell scores 41, Cavaliers overcome 22-point deficit to beat the Celtics 123-116
item.description: BOSTON (AP) — Donovan Mitchell scored 41 points, including 12 in the fourth quarter, to help the Cleveland Cavaliers rally from 22 points down and stun the Boston Celtics 123-116 on Friday night in the final regular-season meeting of the Eastern Conference’s top two teams.
item.dc:creator: KYLE HIGHTOWER, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: USA Swimming says Delaware AD Chrissi Rawak will not assume role as CEO and president
item.description: COLORADO SPRINGS, Colo. (AP) — USA Swimming's board of governors said Friday night that Delaware athletic director Chrissi Rawak will not assume the role as CEO and president because of “unforeseen personal circumstances that we learned about late this week.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: JuJu Watkins and No. 4 USC visit No. 2 UCLA in winner-take-all game for Big Ten regular-season title
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — It’s probably not what the Big Ten expected when the league opened its doors to UCLA and USC this season: two West Coast schools dominating the women’s basketball standings.
item.dc:creator: BETH HARRIS, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards suspended 1 game by NBA after picking up 16th technical foul
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Minnesota Timberwolves star Anthony Edwards was suspended one game without pay by the NBA on Friday after picking up his 16th technical foul of the season during the third quarter against the Los Angeles Lakers.
item.dc:creator: JOE REEDY, Associated Press, PIX 11

item.title: Ex-Vikings player calls Tim Walz 'disgusting, disgrace to football' for letting trans athletes in girls sports
item.description: Former Minnesota Vikings player Jack Brewer called out Minnesota Gov. Tim Walz for allowing transgender athletes to participate in girls sports.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: QB Matthew Stafford gets a restructured contract and agrees to stay with the Los Angeles Rams
item.description: LOS ANGELES (AP) — Quarterback Matthew Stafford is staying with the Los Angeles Rams under a restructured contract, ending weeks of speculation about the Super Bowl winner's future. The Rams announced their new agreement with Stafford on Friday without initially revealing any details.
item.dc:creator: GREG BEACHAM, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: Joel Embiid will miss the rest of the season for treatment and rehabilitation of his left knee
item.description: CAMDEN, N.J. (AP) — Joel Embiid could have been one of the all-time greats of his era. The 7-footer who anchored the 76ers' laborious rebuilding plan known as the Process sure flashed his dominance at times through his injury-riddled career. He dropped 70 points. Won an MVP and two scoring titles.
item.dc:creator: DAN GELSTON, Associated Press, PHL 17

item.title: San Diego FC home opener: Where to watch outside Snapdragon Stadium
item.description: After a stunning win against the Los Angeles Galaxy in its Major League Soccer debut, San Diego FC is set to make its first-ever appearance on the club's home turf on Saturday.
item.dc:creator: Danielle Dawson, Fox 5

item.title: Knapp goes from a 59 to a 70 but still has the lead in the Cognizant Classic
item.description: Jake Knapp still has the lead at the Cognizant Classic even though it felt like a tough day at the office.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KPRC 2

item.title: Cal quartet auditions at NFL scouting combine in Indianapolis
item.description: Cal football saw Teddye Buchanan, Nohl Williams, Marcus Harris and Craig Woodson participate at the NFL scouting combine ahead of their March 20 pro day.
item.dc:creator: Cam Inman, The Mercury News

item.title: Indy 500 champ Newgarden becomes 1st driver to sign with Klutch Sports Group management agency
item.description: ST. PETERSBURG, Fla. (AP) — Two-time reigning Indianapolis 500 winner champion Josef Newgarden has signed with Klutch Sports Group, the Rich Paul-founded management agency that also represents LeBron James, Darius Garland, Anthony Davis, Draymond Green and USC star JuJu Watkins.
item.dc:creator: JENNA FRYER, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Trump says he 'wouldn't ban' Eagles' 'tush push' amid calls to ban it, reiterates hatred for kickoff rule
item.description: While there are calls around the NFL to ban the Philadelphia Eagles' "tush push," it doesn't sound like President Donald Trump will be issuing an order on it any time soon.
item.dc:creator: Fox News

item.title: Jose Mourinho banned for four matches and fined after Turkish referees comment
item.description: ISTANBUL, Turkey (AP) — Fenerbahce manager Jose Mourinho was given a four-match ban and fined by the Turkish Football Federation following his comments about Turkish referees after a match at Galatasaray.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: In dominant triple-double performance, Pelicans' Zion Williamson provides reminder of his talent
item.description: PHOENIX (AP) — The injuries have taken on toll on Zion Williamson during his six-year NBA career. So have the losses. But on nights like Thursday, there are tantalizing reminders of how much talent the 2019 No. 1 overall pick still possesses.
item.dc:creator: DAVID BRANDT, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Southern California, UCLA, Texas and Notre Dame are projected top seeds in women's NCAA Tournament
item.description: JuJu Watkins and Southern California have moved up to a No. 1 seed in the women's NCAA Tournament in the latest projections of the top teams.
item.dc:creator: DOUG FEINBERG, Associated Press, KGET 17, NBC

item.title: Bay Area rap legend to perform at Oakland Roots opener
item.description: (KRON) -- Bay Area rap icon Too Short has been announced as the halftime entertainment for the Oakland Roots Soccer Club's home opener next month. The Roots will play their 2025 season opener on Saturday, March 22 against San Antonio FC.
item.dc:creator: Alex Baker, KRON4

item.title: Bears prospects to watch at the NFL Scouting Combine: Defensive linemen and linebackers
item.description: The NFL Scouting Combine is showcasing top defensive line and linebacker prospects, including James Pearce Jr., Mykel Williams, Mike Green, Shemar Stewart, Jack Sawyer, Donovan Ezeiruaku, Landon Jackson, Princely Umanmielen, Mason Graham, and Kenneth Grant.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: RSL eliminated from Champions Cub with 2-1 loss
item.description: SANDY, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - Real Salt Lake failed to advance to the Round of 16 of the 2025 CONCACAF Champions Cup with a 2-1 home loss against CS Herediano on Wednesday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego Wave FC to host 2025 jersey launch event at Belmont Park
item.description: San Diego Wave FC is gearing up for the launch of the team's 2025 jersey kit, with a special event slated for Thursday at Beach House, located at Belmont Park in Mission Beach.
item.dc:creator: Amber Coakley, Fox 5

item.title: Utah wins another tight 2-1 game over Chicago
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - The Utah Hockey Club is learning how to finish games just in time for a playoff push. Lawson Crouse scored the game-winning goal with 7:48 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Chicago Blackhawks 2-1 at Delta Center on Tuesday.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Girls Softball: Christian 5, El Capitan 3
item.description: SAN DIEGO (KUSI)- Spring sports underway with Christian beating El Capitan on Monday afternoon 5-3. Patriots were lead by Ava Barrios, Long Beach State commit was dominate in the circle going five innings with 12 strikeouts.
item.dc:creator: Nick James, Fox 5

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, NewsNation

item.title: Cleveland Guardians owner Lawrence J. Dolan dies at 94
item.description: CLEVELAND (AP) — Lawrence J. Dolan, owner of Cleveland's Major League Baseball team since 2000, has died. He was 94. Dolan died Sunday night of natural causes, the Cleveland Guardians said Monday in a statement. “Mr.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Handwritten love letter from Michael Jordan's high school days hits auction
item.description: A series of rare Michael Jordan items, including a holy grail autographed basketball card and a handwritten love letter, are being auctioned at Leland's Auctions in New York.
item.dc:creator: Eli Ong, WGN 9

item.title: University of Utah fires head basketball coach Craig Smith
item.description: The University of Utah has fired the head coach of its men's basketball program, Craig Smith. Assistant coach Josh Eilert will take over for the remainder of the season.
item.dc:creator: Ryan Bittan, ABC 4

item.title: Guenther scores game-winner in 2-1 victory over Vancouver
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Dylan Guenther scored the tiebreaking goal with 5:53 left in regulation, and the Utah Hockey Club defeated the Vancouver Canucks 2-1 at Delta Center on Sunday. Guenther scored on the power play by tipping in a backdoor pass from Nick Schmaltz at the left post.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: San Diego FC wins inaugural match against LA Galaxy 2-0
item.description: San Diego FC dominated its inaugural match against LA Galaxy 2-0 in the 30th MLS season, scoring its first-ever goal in the 52nd minute.
item.dc:creator: Anna Ashcraft, Fox 5

item.title: Utah's comeback effort falls short at UCF, 76-72
item.description: ORLANDO, Fla. (ABC4 Sports) - Darius Johnson scored a reverse layup with 2.5 seconds left to give UCF the lead and Keyshawn Hall added two free throws after a turnover as the Knights knocked off Utah, 76-72 Sunday to snap a seven-game losing streak and earn their first win in a month.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Keyonte George scores 30 in Jazz win over Rockets
item.description: SALT LAKE CITY (ABC4 Sports) - Keyonte George scored 30 points and Lauri Markkanen added 23 points and 10 rebounds to rally the Utah Jazz to a 124-115 victory over the Houston Rockets on Saturday night.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Hayton records first Utah hat trick in 5-3 loss to Kings
item.description: LOS ANGELES (ABC4 Sports) - Despite Barrett Hayton recording the first hat trick in Utah Hockey Club history, Drew Doughty had a goal and two assists in the Los Angeles Kings’ 5-3 win at Crypto.com Arena on Saturday. “I thought we kind of left it all out there, played with good pace,” Hayton said.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Utah State sweeps San Diego State, 79-71
item.description: LOGAN, Utah (ABC4 Sports) - For just the second time first since joining the Mountain West Conference, Utah State sweeps San Diego State. Dexter Akanno scored a career-high 26 points, making 7-of-9 three-pointers to lead the Aggies to a 79-71 win over the Aztecs Saturday night at The Spectrum.
item.dc:creator: Dana Greene, ABC 4

item.title: Booker, Durant and Beal help the Suns beat the Bulls to snap a 4-game losing streak
item.description: Devin Booker had 29 points and eight assists, Kevin Durant scored 27 points and Bradley Beal had 25 in his return to the starting lineup to help the Phoenix Suns beat the Chicago Bulls 121-117 on Saturday to end a four-game losing streak.
item.dc:creator: Associated Press, WGN 9

item.title: Boys Basketball: Mission Bay 44, Torrey Pines 42
item.description: A big time matchup in boys open division quarters with a #4 and #5 seed matchup, Torrey Pines and Mission Bay.
item.dc:creator: Allison Edmonds, Fox 5
